project.name: harness-kit
project.description: Project-agnostic AI agent harness with stage orchestration, bounded loops, and MCP context tools.

modelPolicy.description: Three-tier capability model. Copilot Auto is the recommended default for all tiers when using GitHub Copilot — it selects an appropriate model based on task context. Pin a specific model only when reproducible evals or deliberate cross-model review require a consistent identity. See HARNESS.md § Model Roles for full rationale.

tiers.high-reasoning: Sustained multi-hop reasoning over large contexts. Use for Understand, Architect, Review Breadth, Review Depth, and Feedback. These stages require sustained context-holding and architectural judgment — a weaker model misses cross-cutting dependencies. Pinned example: claude-opus-4.8.
tiers.balanced-coding: Fast, accurate code generation with strong instruction-following. Use for Implement and fix loops (build-fix, test-fix). The Architecture Brief already constrains the problem; what matters here is speed and correctness. Pinned examples: gpt-5.3-codex (coding specialist) or claude-sonnet-4.x (balanced alternative).
tiers.fast-cheap-local: Cheap, offline, high-volume work: lint-debt experiments, metric optimization, background enrichment, and triage loops. Run via Ollama or LM Studio. Not suitable for architecture gates, security review, or multi-tenant isolation decisions.

modelPolicy.crossModelReview: Implementer and reviewer must differ. The router enforces models.implementer !== models.reviewer. If both are on Copilot Auto, explicitly select distinct models for the review-fix pass to break single-model echo chambers.
modelPolicy.autoNote: Copilot Auto is a safe default for high-reasoning and balanced-coding tiers. It dynamically selects an appropriate model. Only fast-cheap-local work requires opting out of Auto (local models are not available via Copilot).

implementer.note: Any balanced-coding model works here. gpt-5.3-codex is a coding specialist; claude-sonnet-4.x is a strong alternative. Must differ from reviewer for cross-model review.

reviewer.note: Any high-reasoning model works here. Must differ from implementer for cross-model review.

graph.pluginRoot: <absolute path to a local Understand-Anything plugin checkout, or leave blank>

evolve.description: Meta-loop for iterative refinement of harness routing guidance based on experiment scoring

traceGrading.description: Deterministic trajectory scoring for convergence loops and workflow metrics

otel.description: OpenTelemetry trace export for observability dashboard

feature.description: Full feature delivery through the complete stage machine.

review.description: Independent review path without an implementation handoff.

turnkey-coding.description: Turnkey coding delivery from understanding through final feedback.

multi-agent-orchestration.description: Design and implement orchestration behavior with full gate and review coverage.

drop-in-memory.description: Integrate memory/state capabilities with architectural checks and deep review.

turnkey-coding.description: Ship feature work in a full harness cycle.

multi-agent-orchestration.description: Plan or implement multi-agent orchestration and handoff behavior.

drop-in-memory.description: Add persistent memory/state features and retrieval flows.

catalog.name: harness-kit
catalog.description: Project-agnostic AI agent harness with stage orchestration, bounded loops, and MCP context tools.
